name: CoderAnimeMe
about: CoderAnimeMe is a programming creator identity built around learning in public, sharing progress, and growing through real projects.
The journey starts with Python and creative coding, then expands into web development, stronger project systems, and better technical communication.
This website is designed as a long-term creator portfolio where every project, experiment, and future tutorial can connect in one place.
currentFocus: Python, Turtle Graphics, and Creative Coding

seo.title: CoderAnimeMe | Code. Create. Grow.
seo.description: Modern programming creator portfolio focused on Python, creative coding, projects, and a growing learning journey.
